This reminds me of the old-school German 'Machine Team' era.. Klinsmann, Matthäus, Völler, and the generations before them. Before the attractive football under Klinsmann and Löw. Back then, Germany was all about resilience, they could go a goal down, but you always felt they’d find a way back and turn the game around.
The Ivory Coast should be so proud of themselves. They played a phenomenal game of football. I'm rooting for them after randomly adopting them during this game.
